Create Irrigation Events Data

Create Irrigation Schedule Rules Data

Compute AquaCrop day-number from a given date
download_source()
Download AquaCrop Source Code

Get Salinity Description from ECe Value
find_onset()
Compute AquaCrop Growing Season Onset Day per Year

Install AquaCrop Binary
install_source()
Install AquaCrop from Source
is_cli()
Check if file is a valid AquaCrop climate file
is_eto()
Check if file is a valid AquaCrop reference evapotranspiration file
is_leap_year()
Check if a Year is a Leap Year
is_plu()
Check if file is a valid AquaCrop rainfall file
is_tnx()
Check if file is a valid AquaCrop temperature file

Convert data.frame to parameter list for batch functions
path_to_file()
Get access to CO2 Files Bundled in aquacroptools

Parse an AquaCrop Calendar (.CAL) File

Round to Nearest Multiple

Run AquaCrop simulation

Convert Salinity Level to ECe Value

weather

Write Complete AquaCrop Climate Dataset

Write AquaCrop Crop File

Write Fixed-Width Format File
